svg.metadata:
{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph LR
 S[Start] --> R[resolve-address]
 R -->|URL, Filename| T[file-transfer]
 T -->|LocalPath| P[beacon-mediaconversion-*]
 P -->|OutputFile| SR[send-result]
 SR --> E[End]

 R -.->|Error| E
 T -.->|Error| E
 P -.->|Error| E
 SR -.->|Error| E
","style":"notebook"}
